bead.title: server: refresh server.addr before restart status queries
bead.description:
PROBLEM
After rebuilding/installing DDx at commit b98896c2c and restarting ddx-server.service on 2026-06-16, clients querying worker status could observe stale server.addr state and fall back to a dead pid path instead of the restarted server. This hid whether valid desired worker state for active projects such as /Users/erik/Projects/ddx and /Users/erik/Projects/sesame had been restored automatically.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- cli/internal/server/server.go:360-381 calls reconcileDesiredWorkersAfterStartup from ListenAndServe/ListenAndServeTLS and schedules delayed passes, but the production restart path did not prove that clients see the restarted server address before status is queried.
- cli/internal/server/server_startup_reconcile_test.go:96-204 covers fake controller startup replacement only, leaving no process-backed regression for a restarted server launching and reporting real managed ddx work children.
- cli/cmd/worker.go:118-123 and :169-174 explicitly call POST /api/agent/workers/reconcile after worker set/start, which masked startup reconcile and stale-address failures.

PROPOSED FIX
Ensure server.addr is refreshed during normal server restart before worker status clients query it, and add restart status coverage proving `ddx worker status --json --project <path>` reports exactly the desired running worker for each valid project covered by the restart test without requiring an operator reconcile.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement GraphQL worker count/cap changes from ddx-c713d75e. Do not change bead claim semantics or Fizeau routing. Do not remove valid desired worker state for active projects such as /Users/erik/Projects/ddx and /Users/erik/Projects/sesame. Do not broaden startup reconcile semantics beyond what is needed for status to observe the restarted server and desired worker count. Governing artifact reference: plan:server-operator-workbench.

PARENT
- ddx-8674fc2d

DEPENDENCIES
- None supplied by parent bead.
bead.acceptance:
1. New or extended test TestServerServiceRestart_RewritesServerAddrBeforeStatus proves the restarted server rewrites server.addr before `ddx worker status --json --project <path>` can observe a dead pid fallback.
2. New or extended test TestWorkerStatusAfterServiceRestart_ReportsExactDesiredWorkers proves `ddx worker status --json --project <path>` after restart reports exactly the desired running worker for each valid project fixture covered by the restart test.
3. The status-path test does not call `ddx worker reconcile` or POST /api/agent/workers/reconcile after restart.
4. `cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... ./cmd/...` passes.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
